title: MTH 251 — secant slope + Alpha Centauri velocity problem
html:
Calculus I homework screenshot: Q1 finding the slope of the secant line through (-1, f(-1)) and (2, f(2)), Q2 a baby-alien-on-Alpha-Centauri velocity problem (y = 39t - 21t²) building toward instantaneous velocity — early-derivative work in Yahir's at osu.

cs coursework · osu · calculus i
